places.name: Koko Crater Trail
places.description: Climbing this abandoned railway leads to breathtaking vistas of O‘ahu.

places.name: Bishop Museum
places.description: This museum of Hawaiian and Polynesian culture is the legacy of the last descendant of the Kamehameha Dynasty.

places.name: Nisshodo Candy Store
places.description: This mom-and-pop Japanese sweets shop has been serving cloud-light mochi for almost a century.

places.name: Shangri La
places.description: Doris Duke's lasting collection of Islamic Art, hidden in a Hawaiian paradise.

places.name: Iolani Palace
places.description: The only royal palace on U.S. soil has been a territorial capitol, a military headquarters, and a prison for a queen.

places.name: Spitting Caves
places.description: A unique set of caves that spits waves back out into the ocean.

places.name: Corsair Plane Wreck Dive Site
places.description: This WWII plane died a quiet death, and is now a garden eel playground.
